requirement_topic.en: Kazakhstan EV Policy, Incentives, and Public Charging Projects
requirement_topic.zh: 哈萨克斯坦电动车政策、激励和公共充电项目
requirement_topic.zht: 哈薩克斯坦電動車政策、激勵和公共充電項目

summary.en: Kazakhstan EV charger deployment can be shaped by national industrial policy, customs and tax treatment, municipal charging plans, public procurement, parking rules, tariff structures, and project subsidies or incentives. These policy measures do not replace product conformity assessment, but they can determine charger location, ownership model, payment function, data reporting, local-language documentation, and maintenance obligations.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦电动汽车充电设备部署可能受国家产业政策、海关和税务待遇、市政充电规划、公共采购、停车规则、电价结构以及项目补贴或激励影响。这些政策措施不能替代产品合格评定，但可能决定充电设备位置、所有权模式、支付功能、数据报送、本地语言文件和维护义务。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦電動汽車充電設備部署可能受國家產業政策、海關和稅務待遇、市政充電規劃、公共採購、停車規則、電價結構以及項目補貼或激勵影響。這些政策措施不能替代產品合格評定，但可能決定充電設備位置、所有權模式、支付功能、資料報送、本地語言文件和維護義務。

standards_or_laws: Kazakhstan national EV and transport policy measures
Kazakhstan customs and tax measures for electric vehicles and related equipment where applicable
Municipal charging-infrastructure plans and public procurement specifications
Project-specific tariff, payment, data, and maintenance requirements

summary.en: China-side EV charger evidence may include GB/T reports, CQC or other voluntary certificates, OCPP or platform evidence, payment terminal documents, cybersecurity descriptions, and operating records. These materials should be adapted to Kazakhstan procurement, language, tax, payment, and service requirements.
summary.zh: 中国侧电动汽车充电设备证据可能包括GB/T报告、CQC或其他自愿认证、OCPP或平台证据、支付终端文件、网络安全说明和运行记录。这些资料应适配哈萨克斯坦采购、语言、税务、支付和服务要求。
summary.zht: 中國側電動汽車充電設備證據可能包括GB/T報告、CQC或其他自願認證、OCPP或平台證據、支付終端文件、網路安全說明和運行記錄。這些資料應適配哈薩克斯坦採購、語言、稅務、支付和服務要求。

standards_or_laws: China charger platform, metering, and payment documentation

gap.en: Before bidding or import, confirm whether the charger is for private, fleet, public, highway, municipal, or industrial use. Check procurement language, tax and customs codes, metering and payment rules, local service requirements, warranty obligations, and any public-network data interface.
gap.zh: 投标或进口前，应确认充电设备用于私人、车队、公共、高速、市政还是工业场景。应核查采购语言、税务和海关编码、计量和支付规则、本地服务要求、质保义务以及任何公共网络数据接口。
gap.zht: 投標或進口前，應確認充電設備用於私人、車隊、公共、高速、市政還是工業場景。應核查採購語言、稅務和海關編碼、計量和支付規則、本地服務要求、質保義務以及任何公共網路資料介面。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; mandatory where a Kazakhstan law, customs measure, tax rule, public procurement, municipal permit, subsidy, tariff, or public-network requirement applies
mandatory_status.cn: Project-specific depending on Chinese export, customs, platform, payment, and customer requirements

source.publisher: Adilet Legal Information System of Regulatory Legal Acts of the Republic of Kazakhstan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kazakhstan EV policy can affect charger deployment and procurement, but it does not replace EAEU conformity, connector compatibility, grid approval, or site permitting.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哈萨克斯坦电动车政策可能影响充电设备部署和采购，但不能替代EAEU合格评定、连接器兼容性、电网批准或站点许可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哈薩克斯坦電動車政策可能影響充電設備部署和採購，但不能替代EAEU合格評定、連接器相容性、電網批准或站點許可。
